summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Advanced Accounting Module Phase 1: Journal Entries, Dashboard, General Ledger, and Trial Balance. All 30 backend tests pass. Frontend UI fully functional with CRUD operations, posting, cancellation, and all accounting reports.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper ObjectId serialization
Journal entry validation correctly rejects unbalanced entries
Posted entries correctly update account balances
Cancelled entries correctly reverse account balances
All data-testid attributes present for testing
Recharts integration working correctly for dashboard charts
seed_data_creation: Test entries created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Advanced Accounting Module Phase 1 fully functional. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_journal_entries.py cover: dashboard API, journal entries CRUD, posting/cancellation, general ledger, trial balance, validation rules, authentication. Test user: comptable@test.com / Test123!, Company ID: 6974f559a9d10a5493c3241a. Existing entries: EC-00001 (posted), EC-00003 (cancelled).

backend: GET /api/accounting/dashboard - Returns classes, by_type, entries stats, recent_entries
GET /api/journal-entries/ - List all entries with filters (status, journal_type, date)
GET /api/journal-entries/stats - Entry statistics (total, draft, posted, cancelled)
POST /api/journal-entries/ - Create balanced entry with valid account codes
GET /api/journal-entries/{id} - Get single entry with lines
PUT /api/journal-entries/{id} - Update draft entry (description, reference, lines)
POST /api/journal-entries/{id}/post - Post entry and update account balances
POST /api/journal-entries/{id}/cancel - Cancel entry and reverse balances
GET /api/accounting/general-ledger - Transactions by account with filters
GET /api/accounting/trial-balance - Account balances with balanced status
Authentication: All endpoints require auth token
frontend: AccountingDashboard - Stats cards (entries count, total debit/credit, balance status)
AccountingDashboard - Pie chart (balance by account type)
AccountingDashboard - Bar chart (balance by account class)
AccountingDashboard - Type summary cards with counts
AccountingDashboard - Recent entries list with status badges
JournalEntries - List with search, journal filter, status filter
JournalEntries - Create modal with date, reference, journal type, description
JournalEntries - Line items with account selection, debit/credit, balance indicator
JournalEntries - Edit draft entries
JournalEntries - Post draft entries (green checkmark button)
JournalEntries - Delete draft entries (red trash button)
JournalEntries - Cancel posted entries (orange X button)
JournalEntries - View entry details modal
GeneralLedger - Account list with expand/collapse
GeneralLedger - Filter by account, date range
GeneralLedger - Transaction details per account
TrialBalance - Summary cards (total debit, credit, difference)
TrialBalance - Balanced/unbalanced status badge
TrialBalance - Accounts grouped by type with subtotals
TrialBalance - Date filter for historical balance
